arts.ttl: Late deadline day twist sees Leeds United rivals left in dark over Adam Armstrong transfer
arts.sum: Leeds United’s Championship rivals West Bromwich Albion are anxiously waiting to learn whether their loan agreement with Southampton for Adam Armstrong went through in time before last night’s transfer deadline. As for Leeds, they decided against signing a new player in the market.

arts.ttl: Huge January transfer gamble taken by Leeds United despite fine form and thriving squad: Opinion
arts.sum: Leeds United, as always, were linked with a whole host of new players over the course of the… The post Huge January transfer gamble taken by Leeds United despite fine form and thriving squad: Opinion appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 49ers Enterprises take major Leeds United transfer risk as Sheffield United complete triple raid
arts.sum: Jon Newsome fears Leeds United have left themselves a "bit short" for the remainder of the season after the club's lack of transfer activity in the winter window Speaking to Don’t Go To Bed Just Yet, ex-United defender Newsome said: “I’m a bit surprised in all honesty.

arts.ttl: Exciting new Leeds United fan shop opens
arts.sum: Popular artist Andy McVeigh, AKA Burley Banksy, has opened his new base at the Merrion Centre . At the new opening, Leeds United supporters will be able to purchase a wide-selection of themed gifts based around their beloved football club.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke may be proven right by Leeds United’s multi-million double striker stance
arts.sum: Leeds United knocked back a late bid from Real Betis for striker Mateo Joseph, and that development should only serve as more proof of the quality Daniel Farke has in his midst. Other striker news for Leeds came in the form of a confirmed rejected £10million bid lodged by Real Betis to sign Mateo Joseph – per Beren Cross :

arts.ttl: Leeds United's full list of ins and outs after transfer window as five players depart
arts.sum: The only piece of business yesterday saw young defender Jeremiah Mullen leave the Whites and join Scottish Championship outfit Dunfermline Athletic on a permanent deal. No new signings came through the door in the winter window and Daniel Farke will have to go with what he has got as he bids to lead Leeds United back to the promised land.

arts.ttl: Leeds United have five transfer decisions to make after deadline day
arts.sum: But if he finds game time difficult to find now, he will find it near impossible next season if Leeds are a Premier League club, given the arrivals Farke will likely need to sanction. His recent form coupled with the Premier League struggles of parent club Tottenham Hotspur led to questions about a potential mid-season recall.

arts.ttl: Emiliano Buendia fires stark message to Leeds United after failed January transfer
arts.sum: Emiliano Buendia has already sent a stark transfer message the way of Leeds United after his failed move. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke’s January transfer activity fuels tense Leeds United scenario as gamble laid out - Isaac Johnson
arts.sum: With Leeds top of the table and top scorers in the division, with a mighty plus-41 goal difference and now five points from third place, Farke can easily go some way to justifying his transfer stance. The Leeds United boss had only half-jokingly said he was relieved that last Thursday was the final pre-match press conference of the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Coventry City have 'really strong' options to fire Frank Lampard dream as transfer window shuts
arts.sum: The likelihood is that when Haji Wright and Ephron Mason-Clark return to fitness then City will probably switch back to 4-2-3-1, in which case four centre-backs is more than enough cover. Midfield: Jamie Allen, Victor Torp, Ben Sheaf, Matt Grimes, Josh Eccles, Jack Rudoni, Ryan Howley.
